🤖 DGA Capital Analyst AGENTIC pulls live quotes · saved reports · news
Ask an open-ended research question. Claude autonomously pulls live quotes, your saved Grok/Claude reports, sector data, and fresh news — then answers with cited numbers. Multi-step; ~$0.05–0.30 depending on depth.
fills the box — edit the account name, then Analyze
🗂 Saved analyses re-open or print to PDF
🧭 Portfolio Strategist AGENTIC · EV whole-book review → roundup podcast / memo
Full investment-committee review of an entire book. Claude reasons across positions — concentration, correlation, EV, wipeout scenarios — and proposes grounded, advisory adjustments. Then hand off to a Portfolio Roundup podcast or a strategy memo. ~$0.30–1.00.
⌘/Ctrl-click to combine 2–3 accounts (e.g. ANAT-IRA + ANAT-DEF) into one book.
or
📋 Past committee reviews saved to DB + Dropbox · survives rebuilds

🔬 LLM Lab

Side-by-side A/B testing of Grok (current default) vs Claude Opus on any saved report. Vote on each comparison and track aggregate quality over time.
🎙️ DGA HiTech Podcast
① Script Generator
Pick a ticker with BOTH Grok + Claude reports. Generates dialogue and renders it as styled chat bubbles. Read 2–3 samples before building audio. ~$0.20 / script (Claude Opus).

🎙️ Transcripts

Ingest interview & keynote transcripts (paste a YouTube link), auto-extract the companies mentioned, and index earnings calls — then mine it all with the AI Analyst.
📥 Ingest a YouTube transcript
Paste a YouTube URL (interview, keynote, fireside). We pull the transcript, extract every public company mentioned with the speaker's stance + exact quote, and store it. ~$0.02–0.05 / video.
📞 Earnings-call index —
Index earnings calls for your covered names so the AI Analyst retrieves only the relevant passages. Backfill history pulls years of calls from a public dataset (free) and backs them up to your Dropbox; Latest calls fills forward via Grok — every quarter from the dataset cutoff up to the newest reported call.
fills forward to the newest reported quarter per name
🤖 Ask the transcripts AGENTIC reads transcripts + earnings calls + your reports
🗂 Saved Q&A re-open · draft memo · print to PDF
Ingested transcripts —
Loading…

Financial statements

Structured income statement, balance sheet, cash flow & comprehensive income pulled from SEC EDGAR XBRL — queryable, multi-year, quarterly + annual. Cash flow is de-cumulated to discrete quarters; Q4 is derived (FY − Q1–Q3). $ in millions unless noted.
📊 Company Dashboard FREE · NO TOKENS
Pick a covered ticker and hit View — six chart panels, a DGA Score and a DGA Value (mean of your saved Grok + Claude price targets), all computed from the persisted SEC XBRL store. Zero LLM cost per view.
📊 Financials store —
📈 Company history

Select a fund or account above to load recipients…

🎯 Options Wheel — covered calls on holdings · cash-secured puts across watchlist + saved reports

Set your max assignment Δ and run a scan. Holdings are scanned for covered calls; your watchlist for cash-secured puts.

📈 Covered calls — holdings first, then your universe

▸ 📉 Cash-secured puts — across watchlist + saved reports (click to expand)
Each tenor (weekly / monthly / quarterly) shows the best strike to sell: highest annualized premium yield with assignment probability ≤ your Δ cap. Rows are ranked by the weekly annualized yield (names with only a monthly/quarterly setup trail below). Covered calls are limited to names you HOLD (you must own the shares); cash-secured puts span your whole universe — watchlist + saved reports. IV/HV > 1 (green) = implied vol above the stock's own realized vol → premium is relatively rich. Cushion = how far the stock can fall before the call trade is underwater. Δ ≈ chance of assignment. Informational only — not investment advice.

📄 DGA Capital Memos — LP-ready investment memoranda

🚂 Railway Cost & Memory LIVE
Loading live usage…
Estimated from this container's live cgroup usage × Railway's published per-unit prices (memory $10/GB·mo, vCPU $20/vCPU·mo). Egress & volume not metered here. Override rates with RAILWAY_PRICE_MEM_GB_MONTH / RAILWAY_PRICE_VCPU_MONTH / RAILWAY_BASE_FEE_MONTH / RAILWAY_INCLUDED_CREDIT env vars to match your plan.
🔗 Linked Accounts · Fidelity (SnapTrade) …
Loading…
Connects Fidelity via SnapTrade (read-only — holdings only, no trading). Your brokerage credentials are entered on the brokerage's own page and never reach this server; the SnapTrade secret is encrypted at rest. GP-only. Set SNAPTRADE_CLIENT_ID / SNAPTRADE_CONSUMER_KEY + DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY on Railway to enable.
🔗 Linked Accounts · Plaid (non-Fidelity) …
Loading…
Connects via Plaid Link → Fidelity OAuth. Your Fidelity credentials are entered on Fidelity's page and never reach this server. The access token is encrypted at rest. GP-only. Set PLAID_CLIENT_ID / PLAID_SECRET / PLAID_ENV and DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY on Railway to enable.
📡 Podcast Distribution (RSS / Apple / Spotify) LIVE
Public RSS feed for syndication to Apple Podcasts / Spotify for Creators / Overcast / Pocket Casts. Paste the URL below into each platform's "Submit a Podcast" / "Add by RSS" form. Submit only after counsel sign-off on the audio disclaimer wording.
▶ View XML
🍎 Apple Podcasts Connect → 🟢 Spotify for Creators → 📺 YouTube Studio →
Before submitting: Set PODCAST_RSS_ARTWORK_URL on Railway to a hosted 3000×3000 PNG/JPG (Apple requires square cover art ≥1400px). Override channel title / description / author via PODCAST_RSS_TITLE / _DESCRIPTION / _AUTHOR env vars.
⚖️ Podcast Compliance Disclaimer ON
Audio disclaimer appended to every podcast episode (intro + outro). Applied at the NEXT audio generation — doesn't retroactively re-render existing episodes. Review the wording with your securities counsel before public RSS launch.
0 ch / 800 max
0 ch / 800 max
Use a voice DIFFERENT from your cast so listeners hear it as a notice.
